title: Strobilanthes anamallaica
taxonomy: Strobilanthes anamallaica belongs to the family Acanthaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the acanthus or acanthus family. The genus Strobilanthes is a group of flowering plants native to tropical Asia. The species anamallaica is a part of this genus, which is characterized by its unique and diverse range of species. The Acanthaceae family is further divided into many subfamilies, including the Acanthoideae, Nelsonioideae, and Thunbergioideae. The classification of Strobilanthes anamallaica provides valuable information about its evolutionary history and relationship with other plants.
